notes: Dataset extracted from official manufacturer publications for preliminary screening only.
Balanced bellows Kb curves are digitized approximations of published 10% overpressure charts where stated.
Final valve selection still requires vendor-certified capacity verification for the exact trim, set pressure, overpressure, backpressure, and service.

The manufacturer_directory section tracks additional official vendor coverage across the Americas, Europe, and Asia even when exact screening-model data have not yet been normalized into the selection engine.

manufacturer_directory.product_scope: Process pressure relief valves; conventional, balanced bellows, and piston-assisted designs

manufacturer_directory.product_scope: ASME safety valves, balanced bellows, pilot-operated and process relief families
manufacturer_directory.notes: Consolidated remains part of Baker Hughes' global valve portfolio and the default screening catalog includes 1900 and 3900 series entries.

manufacturer_directory.official_reference: Flow Safe F80 / F84 / F85 catalogs

manufacturer_directory.notes: Integrated today as explicit vendor models with non-API size labels.

manufacturer_directory.official_reference: LESER SLS Brochure and API Extended Catalog US

manufacturer_directory.notes: Official LESER literature is published as worldwide material and the current catalog includes Type 526 entries.

manufacturer_directory.notes: Official brochure describes sales subsidiaries in Brazil, China, and Russia; small Series 461 models are already integrated for screening.

manufacturer_directory.official_reference: SV418 and SV5708 US technical information sheets

manufacturer_directory.notes: Integrated today as explicit D-J conventional screening models.

manufacturer_directory.official_reference: Type 06120 / 06121 datasheet and HEROSE company literature
manufacturer_directory.product_scope: Industrial safety valves for cryogenic, industrial gas, and process services
manufacturer_directory.notes: Type 06120 / 06121 DN15-DN100 angle safety valves are now normalized into the screening catalog on their published AD2000 basis.

manufacturer_directory.notes: Official LGS datasheet publishes capacities and d0 sizes; normalized screening import is still pending.

manufacturer_directory.product_scope: Process safety and relief valves under ARI SAFE and REYCO families

manufacturer_directory.product_scope: Steam valves, safety valves, and pressure-control products
manufacturer_directory.notes: Official disclosures list overseas companies in Vietnam, China, and the United States. Screening-model extraction is still pending.
